hooks.command: CODEX_SCRIPT="${PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/session-start-codex.sh"; CLAUDE_SCRIPT="${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/session-start.sh"; if [ -f "$CODEX_SCRIPT" ]; then bash "$CODEX_SCRIPT"; else SCRIPT="$CLAUDE_SCRIPT"; [ -f "$SCRIPT" ] || SCRIPT="${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}/.claude/hooks/session-start.sh"; [ -f "$SCRIPT" ] && bash "$SCRIPT" || true; fi
